description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/augfab/game-of-life:latest. Define two stages: style and build. In the style stage add a style job that runs `find . -type f -regex '.*\.[hc]' -print0 | xargs -0 indent -linux` to reformat all C/H files and then runs `git diff --exit-code` to ensure no changes, failing if formatting differs. In the build stage add a build job that runs `make all`, then executes `./build/life -x 100 -y 100 -c 100 -s 123`, and finally runs `valgrind --error-exitcode=1 --leak-check=full --show-leak-kinds=all ./build/life -c 100 -x 100 -y 100` to check for memory errors.
